date_note: Dates use YYYY-MM-DD. Where only month is known, the 1st is used as approximation.

models.name: GPT-1
models.key_capability: First large-scale generative pre-trained transformer for language understanding

models.name: GPT-2
models.key_capability: Coherent long-form text generation; 'too dangerous to release' narrative established AI safety discourse

models.name: GPT-3
models.key_capability: In-context learning and few-shot prompting without fine-tuning; proved scale unlocks emergent abilities

models.name: Codex
models.key_capability: First large-scale code generation model; powered GitHub Copilot; translated natural language to code

models.name: GPT-3.5 Turbo
models.key_capability: RLHF-tuned conversational AI; powered ChatGPT launch; proved chat interface as product category

models.name: GPT-4
models.key_capability: Multimodal input (text+image); massive reasoning improvement; passed bar exam and medical licensing

models.name: GPT-4 Turbo
models.key_capability: 128K context window; cheaper and faster than GPT-4; knowledge cutoff extended to April 2023

models.name: GPT-4o
models.key_capability: Native multimodal (text, image, audio in/out); real-time voice conversation; 2x faster, 50% cheaper than GPT-4 Turbo

models.name: GPT-4o Mini
models.key_capability: Cost-optimised GPT-4o variant; replaced GPT-3.5 Turbo as default; 15x cheaper than GPT-4o

models.name: o1-preview
models.key_capability: First reasoning model with chain-of-thought at inference time; created new paradigm of test-time compute scaling

models.name: o1
models.key_capability: Full release of reasoning model; vision input support; significant improvement on math, coding, science benchmarks

models.name: o1-mini
models.key_capability: Smaller, faster reasoning model optimised for STEM tasks; 80% cheaper than o1-preview

models.name: o3-mini
models.key_capability: Adjustable reasoning effort (low/medium/high); matched o1 on many benchmarks at fraction of cost

models.name: o3
models.key_capability: Full-scale reasoning model with image understanding; tool use; agentic capabilities

models.name: o4-mini
models.key_capability: Cost-efficient reasoning model; tool use and code execution; highest score on SWE-bench at launch

models.name: GPT-5
models.key_capability: Unified model merging GPT and o-series capabilities; native reasoning without separate reasoning mode

models.name: Claude 1
models.key_capability: First public Claude model; Constitutional AI (RLHF+CAI) alignment approach; 100K context window

models.name: Claude 1.3
models.key_capability: Improved instruction following and reduced hallucinations over Claude 1

models.name: Claude 2
models.key_capability: 200K context window; significant coding and math improvement; direct consumer access via claude.ai

models.name: Claude 2.1
models.key_capability: Reduced hallucination rates by 50%; tool use (function calling); improved long-context accuracy

models.name: Claude 3 Haiku
models.key_capability: Fastest Claude 3 tier; vision input; near-instant responses for cost-sensitive workloads

models.name: Claude 3 Sonnet
models.key_capability: Balanced performance/cost tier; vision input; strong coding and analysis capabilities

models.name: Claude 3 Opus
models.key_capability: Most capable Claude 3; near-human comprehension; first Claude to match GPT-4 on benchmarks

models.name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet
models.key_capability: Exceeded Claude 3 Opus at Sonnet pricing; computer use capability; became most popular Claude model

models.name: Claude 3.5 Haiku
models.key_capability: Matched Claude 3 Sonnet performance at Haiku pricing; fastest model in the 3.5 family

models.name: Claude 3.5 Opus
models.key_capability: Strongest Claude 3.5 tier; advanced reasoning and extended thinking capabilities

models.name: Claude 4 Opus
models.key_capability: Generation 4 flagship; significant architecture improvements; agentic coding capabilities

models.name: Claude 4 Sonnet
models.key_capability: Generation 4 balanced tier; matched Claude 3.5 Opus at lower cost

models.name: Claude 4.5 Haiku
models.key_capability: Generation 4.5 fast tier; strong performance at lowest cost point in the Claude 4 family

models.name: Claude 4.5 Sonnet
models.key_capability: Generation 4.5 balanced tier; hybrid reasoning approach combining extended thinking with standard generation

models.name: Claude Opus 4.6
models.key_capability: 1M context window; strongest Claude model; powers Claude Code; state-of-art agentic coding

models.name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
models.key_capability: Generation 4.6 balanced tier; fast output mode; strong coding and analysis at mid-tier pricing

models.name: BERT
models.key_capability: Bidirectional pre-training; revolutionised NLP benchmarks; masked language modelling paradigm

models.name: T5
models.key_capability: Text-to-text framework; unified all NLP tasks into single format; scaled to 11B parameters

models.name: PaLM
models.key_capability: Breakthrough reasoning and code generation; chain-of-thought emergent at scale; 540B parameters

models.name: PaLM 2
models.key_capability: Improved multilingual, reasoning, and coding; compute-optimal training; powered Bard and Vertex AI

models.name: Gemini 1.0 Pro
models.key_capability: Native multimodal understanding (text, image, audio, video); replaced PaLM 2 as Google's foundation

models.name: Gemini 1.0 Ultra
models.key_capability: First model to exceed human expert performance on MMLU (90.0%); Google's GPT-4 competitor

models.name: Gemini 1.5 Pro
models.key_capability: 1M token context window (later 2M); MoE architecture; breakthrough long-context understanding

models.name: Gemini 1.5 Flash
models.key_capability: Distilled from 1.5 Pro; fast and cost-efficient; retained long-context capability

models.name: Gemini 2.0 Flash
models.key_capability: Native tool use; multimodal generation (text, image, audio output); agentic capabilities

models.name: Gemini 2.0 Flash Thinking
models.key_capability: Google's first reasoning model; exposed chain-of-thought reasoning process; competitor to o1

models.name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
models.key_capability: Built-in thinking/reasoning; top of benchmarks at launch; strongest Gemini model

models.name: Gemini 2.5 Flash
models.key_capability: Fast, cost-efficient reasoning model; thinking budgets for cost control

models.name: LLaMA
models.key_capability: Proved smaller open models can match larger closed ones; catalysed entire open-source LLM ecosystem

models.name: Llama 2
models.key_capability: First truly commercially licensable open LLM; RLHF-tuned chat variants; set open-source standard

models.name: Code Llama
models.key_capability: Code-specialised Llama 2; infilling capability; 100K context for code; Python-specialised variant

models.name: Llama 3
models.key_capability: New tokenizer (128K vocab); 15T training tokens; competitive with GPT-3.5 and approaching GPT-4

models.name: Llama 3.1
models.key_capability: First open 400B+ model; 128K context; competitive with GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 on benchmarks

models.name: Llama 3.2
models.key_capability: First multimodal Llama (vision); lightweight 1B/3B models for edge; 11B/90B vision models

models.name: Llama 3.3
models.key_capability: 70B model matching Llama 3.1 405B performance; massive efficiency gain through improved training

models.name: Llama 4 Scout
models.key_capability: MoE architecture (17B active); 10M token context window; natively multimodal

models.name: Llama 4 Maverick
models.key_capability: Larger MoE variant (17B active of 400B total); strong reasoning and generation; competitive with GPT-4o

models.name: Alpaca
models.key_capability: Proved instruction-tuning a small open model with GPT-generated data could match GPT-3.5; cost $600

models.name: Vicuna
models.key_capability: Fine-tuned on ShareGPT conversations; achieved ~90% ChatGPT quality; pioneered LLM-as-judge evaluation

models.name: GPT-NeoX-20B
models.key_capability: Largest fully open-source model at release; rotary position embeddings; community-trained

models.name: Pythia
models.key_capability: Suite of models (70M-12B) trained on same data for scientific study of LLM training dynamics

models.name: BLOOM
models.key_capability: Largest open multilingual model (46 languages); community research project; trained on ROOTS corpus

models.name: Falcon
models.key_capability: Top of Hugging Face Open LLM leaderboard at release; high-quality web data curation (RefinedWeb)

models.name: Falcon 180B
models.key_capability: Largest open model at release; trained on 3.5T tokens; approached GPT-4 on some benchmarks

models.name: Mistral 7B
models.key_capability: Outperformed Llama 2 13B on all benchmarks at half the size; sliding window attention; grouped-query attention

models.name: Mixtral 8x7B
models.key_capability: First successful open MoE model; matched GPT-3.5 at fraction of compute; proved MoE viability for open models

models.name: Mixtral 8x22B
models.key_capability: Scaled MoE to 8x22B; strong multilingual and code performance; function calling support

models.name: Mistral Large
models.key_capability: Mistral's first closed commercial model; strong reasoning and multilingual; API-only

models.name: Mistral Large 2
models.key_capability: 128K context; competitive with GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet; 123B dense model

models.name: Codestral
models.key_capability: Code-specialised Mistral; 80+ programming languages; fill-in-the-middle; 32K context

models.name: Mistral Small
models.key_capability: Cost-efficient model for high-volume tasks; strong on function calling and structured output

models.name: Qwen
models.key_capability: Alibaba's first large open model; strong Chinese and English bilingual performance

models.name: Qwen 1.5
models.key_capability: Improved alignment and multilingual support; scaled to 110B; unified chat and base models

models.name: Qwen 2
models.key_capability: New architecture with GQA; 29 languages; competitive with Llama 3 70B on benchmarks

models.name: Qwen 2.5
models.key_capability: 18T training tokens; strong coding (Qwen2.5-Coder); math specialisation; broad model size range (0.5B-72B)

models.name: DeepSeek LLM
models.key_capability: Strong base model from Chinese startup; 2T training tokens; competitive with Llama 2 70B

models.name: DeepSeek Coder
models.key_capability: Code-specialised model; trained on 2T code tokens; fill-in-the-middle; competitive with CodeLlama

models.name: DeepSeek-V2
models.key_capability: DeepSeekMoE + Multi-head Latent Attention; 128K context; GPT-4 level at fraction of cost

models.name: DeepSeek Coder V2
models.key_capability: Code-specialised V2; matched GPT-4 Turbo on code benchmarks; 338 programming languages

models.name: DeepSeek-V3
models.key_capability: Trained for $5.5M (fraction of competitors); matched GPT-4o and Claude 3.5; proved cost-efficient frontier training

models.name: DeepSeek-R1
models.key_capability: Open-source reasoning model matching o1; RL-trained chain-of-thought; MIT licensed; shook industry assumptions about compute requirements

models.name: Yi
models.key_capability: Founded by Kai-Fu Lee; strong bilingual Chinese/English; competitive with Llama 2 at release

models.name: Yi 1.5
models.key_capability: Improved pre-training and fine-tuning; strong on math and coding; 200K context window

models.name: Phi-2
models.key_capability: Proved small models with high-quality data can outperform 10-25x larger models; textbook-quality data approach

models.name: Phi-3
models.key_capability: 3.8B mini variant matched Mixtral 8x7B; 14B matched GPT-3.5; breakthrough in small model capability

models.name: Phi-4
models.key_capability: Synthetic data focused training; strong math and reasoning; outperformed much larger models on STEM

models.name: DBRX
models.key_capability: Fine-grained MoE (16 experts, 4 active); outperformed Mixtral and Llama 2 70B at launch

models.name: OLMo
models.key_capability: Fully open (weights + data + training code + evaluation); set new standard for open-source transparency

models.name: Command R
models.key_capability: Optimised for RAG and tool use; strong multilingual (10 languages); grounded generation with citations

models.name: Command R+
models.key_capability: Flagship Cohere model; enterprise RAG focus; multi-step tool use; competitive with GPT-4 on business tasks

models.name: Jamba
models.key_capability: First production hybrid SSM-Transformer model; Mamba + Transformer layers; 256K context; linear scaling

models.name: Jamba 1.5
models.key_capability: Scaled hybrid architecture; Mini (12B active) and Large (94B) variants; improved long-context quality

models.name: Grok-1
models.key_capability: xAI's first model; real-time X (Twitter) data access; 'witty and rebellious' personality tuning

models.name: Grok-2
models.key_capability: Vision understanding; image generation via FLUX integration; competitive with GPT-4o on benchmarks

models.name: Grok-3
models.key_capability: Trained on 200K Colossus GPU cluster; DeepSearch and reasoning modes; top benchmarks at launch

models.name: Nemotron
models.key_capability: Built on Llama architecture with custom training; optimised for synthetic data generation; NVIDIA's training showcase

models.name: DALL-E
models.key_capability: First large-scale text-to-image model; proved language models could generate visual content

models.name: DALL-E 2
models.key_capability: CLIP-guided diffusion; inpainting and outpainting; made AI art mainstream

models.name: DALL-E 3
models.key_capability: Native ChatGPT integration; dramatically improved prompt following; text rendering in images

models.name: Stable Diffusion 1.5
models.key_capability: Open-sourced high-quality image generation; democratised AI art; built massive ecosystem of tools and fine-tunes

models.name: Stable Diffusion 2
models.key_capability: 768px native resolution; depth-to-image; removed NSFW training data (controversial)

models.name: Stable Diffusion XL
models.key_capability: 1024px native; two-stage pipeline (base + refiner); major quality leap; became community standard

models.name: Stable Diffusion 3
models.key_capability: MMDiT (Multi-Modal Diffusion Transformer) architecture; flow matching; improved text rendering

models.name: FLUX.1
models.key_capability: From original Stable Diffusion creators; rectified flow transformers; best open image model at launch; three variants (pro/dev/schnell)

models.name: Midjourney v5
models.key_capability: Photorealistic quality leap; default style became less 'painterly'; hands/anatomy greatly improved

models.name: Midjourney v6
models.key_capability: Improved prompt understanding; text in images; more coherent compositions; reduced artifacts

models.name: Gen-1
models.key_capability: First commercial video-to-video synthesis model; structure-guided generation; launched AI video era

models.name: Gen-2
models.key_capability: Text-to-video generation (not just video-to-video); multi-modal inputs; 4-second clips

models.name: Gen-3 Alpha
models.key_capability: Major quality and consistency leap; 10-second clips; better physics and motion; competitive with Sora

models.name: Sora
models.key_capability: Up to 1-minute coherent videos; world model understanding; physics simulation; set new quality bar for AI video

models.name: Kling
models.key_capability: 2-minute video generation; strong motion and physics; first Chinese model competitive with Western video AI

models.name: Veo
models.key_capability: Google DeepMind's video generation model; 1080p output; built on Imagen Video research

models.name: Veo 2
models.key_capability: 4K resolution; improved physics understanding; longer clips; competitive with Sora

models.name: Whisper
models.key_capability: Near-human speech recognition across 99 languages; robust to noise; open-sourced state-of-art ASR

models.name: ElevenLabs Speech Synthesis
models.key_capability: Near-indistinguishable voice cloning from short samples; set new bar for TTS quality; voice marketplace

models.name: Stable Audio
models.key_capability: Text-to-audio and text-to-music generation; up to 3 minutes; audio-to-audio transformation

models.name: Suno v3
models.key_capability: Full song generation (vocals, instruments, lyrics) from text; 2-minute songs; genre flexibility

models.name: Suno v3.5
models.key_capability: 4-minute songs; improved vocal quality and musical coherence; better lyric adherence
